metadata.title: Asondo demo plot — sample only
metadata.description: Public demonstration polygon. This is NOT a real producer plot and does NOT identify any real cooperative member. Real polygons (RFC 7946 GeoJSON, accuracy <= 10 m) are submitted to the EUDR Information System and shared with verified buyers under NDA in the Buyer Pack.
